summary: mutation-guard infrastructure extension (.skills/*.py, .claude/hooks/*.py, .claude/settings*.json) + Operator contract plumbing-leak rule.
notes: Safe overlay. The new infrastructure blocks apply only to agent tool calls (Edit/Write/Bash) inside a deployed workspace. Human maintainers editing via a text editor are unaffected. The plumbing-leak rule is documentation + binary row in the Operator contract; agents that re-read CLAUDE.md at session start apply it on next turn.

changes.note: Added INFRASTRUCTURE_GLOBS + is_infrastructure() + block_msg_infra(). Blocks Edit/Write/NotebookEdit/MultiEdit and Bash redirect/tee/sed-i/open-w on .skills/*.py, .skills/skills/*/*.py, .claude/hooks/*.py, .claude/settings*.json. Validated 7/7.
Operator contract table: new binary row. Auto-tag source + confidence from semantic signal, never surface to operator. Display as observé/déduit/déclaré/incertain only when distinction helps.
Anti-patterns section: new 'Plumbing leak to operator' entry with real negative example from S35 an e-commerce pilot run + corrected version + binary test.

post_steps: No action required. Infrastructure protection active on next tool call in a deployed workspace.
